name: common-pitfalls
description: Orchestrates pitfall prevention skills for common development issues. Auto-triggered during code review to check for TanStack Query, Drizzle ORM, Express API, React, WebSocket, blockchain RPC, and security pitfalls.
capabilities: Detects TanStack Query anti-patterns (keys, invalidation, v5 patterns)
Identifies Drizzle ORM schema and migration issues
Flags Express API route and status code errors
Catches React component mistakes, accessibility, and responsive design issues
Reviews WebSocket implementation including heartbeat and reconnection
Checks blockchain RPC calls, gas estimation, and multicall patterns
author: BarisSozen
securitySummary: This is a pure documentation skill containing only markdown text and metadata. It defines code review patterns and sub-skill orchestration logic. No code execution, file access, network calls, or external dependencies exist. All 36 static findings are false positives from pattern-matching without semantic context.
valueStatement: Code review often misses subtle bugs that cause production issues. This skill orchestrates specialized checks for TanStack Query, Drizzle ORM, Express, React, WebSocket, blockchain, and security patterns to catch issues before they ship.
limitations: Cannot execute code to verify runtime behavior
Cannot access external APIs or test services
Cannot modify code - only identifies potential issues
Does not replace thorough manual testing

useCases.title: Review React and Query code
useCases.description: Catch React component issues and TanStack Query patterns before committing

useCases.title: Audit API and database code
useCases.description: Identify Express route errors and Drizzle ORM schema problems

useCases.title: Check blockchain patterns
useCases.description: Review RPC calls, gas estimation, and security patterns

promptTemplates.title: Full code review
promptTemplates.prompt: Run common-pitfalls skill to check for issues across all code categories

promptTemplates.title: Database review
promptTemplates.prompt: Check for Drizzle ORM pitfalls in the new schema and migrations

promptTemplates.title: API audit
promptTemplates.prompt: Audit Express API routes for status code and storage pattern issues

promptTemplates.title: Security scan
promptTemplates.prompt: Scan for session key handling, caching, and logging security issues

bestPractices: Run before committing to catch issues early
Combine with full-review skill for comprehensive analysis
Use the quick reference checklist during manual review
antiPatterns: Skipping review and shipping directly to production
Ignoring findings without understanding the context
Using this skill instead of thorough testing

faq.question: Which tools support this skill?
faq.answer: Works with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code. Auto-triggers with full-review skill.

faq.question: What categories does it check?
faq.answer: TanStack Query, Drizzle ORM, Express API, React, WebSocket, blockchain RPC, and security.

faq.question: Does it modify my code?
faq.answer: No. It only identifies potential issues and reports findings. You must fix them manually.

faq.question: Is my code data safe?
faq.answer: Yes. This is a prompt-only skill. Your code never leaves the conversation and is not stored.

faq.question: Why were issues missed?
faq.answer: The skill detects known patterns. Novel code, business logic errors, and runtime issues require testing.

faq.question: How is this different from linters?
faq.answer: Linters check syntax and style. This skill catches semantic patterns and architectural issues.
